name: Bourbon Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate chips and sweetened condensed milk in a large bowl and cover loosely.
2. Cook in the microwave for 3 minutes on High.
3. Remove from the microwave and stir until smooth.
4. Add the bourbon and orange extract; mix well.
5. Grease an 8-inch square pan and sprinkle the bottom with almonds.
6. Pour the mixture into the pan.
7. Let stand until firm or chill in the refrigerator.
